name: Potato and Adzuki Bean Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the adzuki beans overnight in the refrigerator.
2. Drain the beans.
3. Cook the potatoes in enough water to cover them until cooked through. Drain and set aside 1 cup of the potato cooking liquid.
4. Peel the potatoes, then mash them with the egg, butter, and pepper.
5. Cook the adzuki beans, covered, in the reserved potato liquid until tender and the liquid is absorbed (about 45-50 minutes).
6. Combine the cooked beans, parsley, and mashed potato mixture. Shape into 12 patties and coat each patty with Parmesan cheese.
7. Heat oil in a large skillet, then fry the patties on both sides until golden brown.
